value_chain_position: Commerce operating system and payments rail layer — provides the end-to-end merchant infrastructure stack (storefront, payments, lending, logistics) and collects a toll on every transaction processed through Shopify Payments and Shopify Capital.
relative_comps: Shopify is the dominant SMB-to-mid-market commerce OS with 32% YoY revenue growth and deepening payments penetration (Merchant Solutions now ~75% of revenue) creating a self-reinforcing take-rate toll. It competes against BigCommerce and Wix on the low end and Salesforce/SAP on enterprise; Amazon is both a competitor and channel. FCF margin of 17% is expanding as payments mix grows. The multiple reflects compounder status but Shopify's network-effect moat in payments data is underappreciated in comps.
